blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,422 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
